hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_desc: Talk about future plans and arrange meetings with going to -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Making Arrangements: Talking About Future Plans
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 12 -- Making Arrangements

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am going to send you the new agenda this afternoon. Next week is busy for the trading team. On Monday, we are going to confirm the shipment with Colombia. On Wednesday, I am going to meet the supplier online at three. One more thing: I am not going to be in the office on Friday, so we need to reschedule our weekly call. Could you find a free slot for me? Thank you so much. Talk soon.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. No problem at all. I am going to look at the calendar right now. I am going to move our weekly call to Thursday morning. I think ten o'clock is a good slot. I am not going to schedule anything before ten, so we will have time to talk. I am also going to set up the online room for the supplier meeting on Wednesday. I will send you the full agenda before Monday. Have a great week.

extra_audio.text: First, open the calendar and look for a free slot. Then, say your plan with going to, like I am going to send the agenda. Next, suggest a new time, like Let us reschedule the call to Thursday. Finally, confirm the appointment, like The meeting is at ten on Thursday.
